content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh

## Summary

No correctness, safety, or robustness issues found in the in-scope branch changes. The refactor in src/adapters/process_backend.rs cleanly centralizes the duplicated timeout heuristic into a private helper, both former call sites now use that helper, and the added unit test covers the preserved behavior. I did not run the acceptance-gate commands in this shell because `cargo` is not available here.

## Amendments

None.
